reason: Backend pre-development checklist and guide index for adding a new benchmark surface.
API type, status, marker, and generated CRD rules for the new Esrally resource.

Job builder conventions for images, labels, tolerations, resources, prechecks, and log volumes.
Prometheus exporter/parser conventions if Rally CSV metrics are implemented.

Needed if adding an Elasticsearch precheck under cmd/tools/pkg/tools.
Project-specific error propagation and retry behavior for the new reconciler.

Required quality checks and generated-file review rules.
Rally command, Docker, track, and metrics research mapped to kubebench implementation decisions.
